summary: Clear matrix recording captures a solid second set with Jerry on the prowl, standout "He's Gone" and high‑energy "The Other One", though "Mojo" feels a bit stuck.
review: This matrix source delivers great clarity and ambiance, letting the band’s late‑1978 vibe shine through. The second set is highlighted by an inspired "He's Gone", a fire‑filled "The Other One" that rolls into a noteworthy "Stella Blue", while Jerry Garcia’s guitar work is described as being on the prowl. The only drawback mentioned is a slightly stuck and drawn‑out "Mojo" section.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review praises both the musical performance (strong second set, standout songs) and the recording quality (clarity, good matrix), with only minor criticisms.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great clarity and ambiance noted; some comment about the SBDs sounding a bit dry and "Mojo" feeling stuck, but overall an excellent matrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set carries the momentum with extended jams and strong transitions, delivering the highlight moments of the night.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar described as "on the prowl" and full of energy during The Other One.
